implemented.title: SFT LoRA direct generation
implemented.notes: Baseline; maintained SFT script uses CHATPATHWAY_ASSET_ROOT-aware defaults and can run single-process or under torchrun.

implemented.title: Distributed SFT LoRA direct generation
implemented.inference_mode: Qwen + distributed SFT LoRA direct generation
implemented.notes: Wrapper launches method.training.sft through torch.distributed.run; pass --nproc-per-node after the experiment '--' separator.

implemented.title: FrameworkA HNN-regularized LoRA
implemented.training_coupling: LoRA and HNN jointly updated; AE frozen
implemented.notes: HNN affects inference only through the saved adapter unless a separate rollout-assisted inference script is used.

implemented.title: FrameworkA PHNN prompt-control regularized LoRA
implemented.granularity: answer-token hidden velocity with prompt-level control u
implemented.training_coupling: LoRA and PHNN jointly updated; AE frozen
implemented.notes: Experimental prototype copied from FrameworkA; no server checkpoint provenance yet.

implemented.title: LeJEPA-style pathway sentence latent prediction
implemented.middle_network: JEPA predictor head with SIGReg-style anti-collapse regularizer
implemented.training_coupling: frozen Qwen/optional LoRA embeddings plus trainable JEPA head
implemented.inference_mode: latent prediction scoring, not text generation
implemented.notes: Exploratory method-layer probe for pathway-language representation quality.

implemented.title: Controlled Neural ODE latent teacher
implemented.middle_network: generic controlled Neural ODE MLP vector field
implemented.training_coupling: dynamics-only teacher: frozen Qwen+LoRA and frozen AE
implemented.inference_mode: latent rollout scoring, not text generation
implemented.notes: Learns dz/dt=f(z,u,t) on AE latent trajectories and scores rollout fit.

implemented.title: Controlled gradient-flow energy latent teacher
implemented.middle_network: dissipative energy network dz/dt=-R grad E(z,u,t)+Gu
implemented.training_coupling: dynamics-only teacher: frozen Qwen+LoRA and frozen AE
implemented.inference_mode: latent rollout scoring, not text generation
implemented.notes: Energy-based dissipative baseline for interpretable latent trajectory fitting.

implemented.title: Controlled Koopman latent teacher
implemented.middle_network: controlled approximately linear Koopman latent dynamics
implemented.training_coupling: dynamics-only teacher: frozen Qwen+LoRA and frozen AE
implemented.inference_mode: latent rollout scoring, not text generation
implemented.notes: Linear latent-evolution baseline for testing whether simple dynamics suffice.

implemented.title: Controlled GENERIC latent teacher
implemented.middle_network: GENERIC-style reversible plus irreversible energy/entropy dynamics
implemented.training_coupling: dynamics-only teacher: frozen Qwen+LoRA and frozen AE
implemented.inference_mode: latent rollout scoring, not text generation
implemented.notes: Tests reversible/irreversible structured dynamics beyond HNN/PHNN.

implemented.title: Sparse-library SINDy latent teacher
implemented.training_coupling: dynamics-only teacher: frozen Qwen+LoRA and frozen AE
implemented.inference_mode: latent rollout scoring, not text generation
implemented.notes: Uses a compact library [1,t,z,z^2,sin(z),u,z*u] with L1 sparsity.

implemented.title: Encoder-conditioned latent ODE teacher
implemented.granularity: answer-token latent trajectory with prompt-derived z0
implemented.training_coupling: dynamics-only teacher: frozen Qwen+LoRA and frozen AE
implemented.inference_mode: latent rollout scoring, not text generation
implemented.notes: Stricter than b01 because rollout initial state is inferred from the prompt/control vector instead of copied from the target answer trajectory.

implemented.title: Neural ODE rollout-assisted candidate reranking
implemented.training_coupling: train Neural ODE teacher, then use it only at inference reranking
implemented.notes: Requires candidate columns in the input CSV; picks lowest rollout-loss candidate.

implemented.title: Neural ODE rollout residual injection
implemented.middle_network: trained Neural ODE latent teacher plus frozen AE decoder
implemented.training_coupling: train Neural ODE teacher, then inject decoded rollout residual at inference
implemented.notes: Prototype isolated from normal direct LoRA inference; injects residual into final prompt embedding.

implemented.title: Staged Neural ODE teacher distilled into LoRA
implemented.middle_network: frozen trained Neural ODE latent teacher plus frozen AE decoder
implemented.training_coupling: SFT LoRA updated with an additional frozen-teacher velocity distillation loss
implemented.notes: Two-stage framework: train teacher first, then train only LoRA against SFT CE plus teacher decoded-velocity alignment.

implemented.title: Joint Neural ODE-regularized LoRA
implemented.middle_network: trainable controlled Neural ODE MLP vector field
implemented.training_coupling: LoRA and Neural ODE jointly updated; AE frozen
implemented.inference_mode: Qwen + jointly trained LoRA direct generation
implemented.notes: Generalized FrameworkA row using method.training.joint_lora_dynamics with --variant neural_ode.

implemented.title: Joint gradient-flow-regularized LoRA
implemented.middle_network: trainable dissipative energy network dz/dt=-R grad E(z,u,t)+Gu
implemented.training_coupling: LoRA and gradient-flow dynamics jointly updated; AE frozen
implemented.inference_mode: Qwen + jointly trained LoRA direct generation
implemented.notes: Generalized FrameworkA row using method.training.joint_lora_dynamics with --variant gradient_flow.

implemented.title: Qwen C2S transfer application
implemented.middle_network: none in runtime; C2S LoRA fine-tuning
implemented.training_coupling: Qwen LoRA initialized from pathway adapter in legacy scripts
implemented.inference_mode: Qwen C2S LoRA generation plus Task VI evaluator
implemented.notes: Downstream transfer/application row with maintained argparse C2S training and Task VI generation wrappers.

middle_networks: generic Neural ODE MLP vector field
latent ODE with encoder-conditioned initial state
training_couplings: staged: SFT -> AE -> dynamics -> LoRA distillation
joint: LoRA + dynamics trained together with frozen AE
dynamics-only teacher: freeze LoRA and train dynamics on latent trajectories
distributed DDP/FSDP variants for long sequence and large batch
inference_modes: LoRA-only direct generation after dynamics regularization
